caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses speaks against a solid black background. She wears a light green, long-sleeved tunic with small pink floral embroidery and a dark beaded necklace. A thin black lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small circular logo appears with the text "NPTEL" written beneath it. As the sequence progresses, the woman gestures with her hands to emphasize her speech, moving them from her sides toward the center of her chest and then slightly outward again. Her facial expressions shift as she talks, with her mouth opening and closing and her gaze remaining focused forward toward the camera. The lighting is consistent throughout the scene, keeping the focus entirely on the subject.
